description: A batch of spans with optional shared attributes
name: SpanBatch

common.description: Shared attributes applied to all spans in this batch

attributes.description: Key-value attributes applied to every span in the batch

items.description: A single distributed trace span in New Relic format

id.description: Unique identifier for this span (16 hex characters)

trace.id.description: Trace ID that groups all spans in a distributed trace

timestamp.description: Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the span started

name.description: Name of the operation represented by this span

parent.id.description: The span ID of the parent span

duration.ms.description: Duration of the span in milliseconds

service.name.description: Name of the service that generated this span

error.description: Whether the span represents an error
